# Alik

> Alik is a personal AI that finds your people. It learns who you are through real conversations, then talks to other users' AIs to find genuinely compatible friends and connections. No swiping. No browsing.

## About

Alik is an AI-powered social connection platform. Instead of traditional matching apps that rely on profiles, photos, and swiping, Alik uses a personal AI agent that gets to know each user through natural text and voice conversations. The AI learns your values, humor, communication style, and what kind of people make your life better.

Your AI then autonomously communicates with other users' AIs to find compatible matches. When there's a genuine fit, Alik creates a contextual introduction explaining exactly why you'd click — then steps back.

Alik is designed for all types of meaningful connections — friendships, not just romantic matches.

## Key Features

- Conversational learning: Natural text and voice conversations instead of quizzes or profiles
- AI-to-AI matchmaking: Your AI talks to other AIs worldwide to find compatible people
- Contextual introductions: Matches come with explanations of why you'd connect
- Privacy-first: Three-layer privacy model — private memory, matchable signals, shareable intros
- All connection types: Friends, mentors, collaborators — not just dates
- Always working: Your AI searches while you sleep, work, and live your life

## How It Works

1. You talk to your Alik through text or voice conversations
2. Alik learns who you really are — your values, humor, how you connect
3. Your AI searches by talking to other users' AIs around the world
4. When a genuine match is found, Alik creates a contextual introduction
5. You approve the introduction before anything is shared
6. The humans connect; the AI steps back

## Privacy Model

Alik uses a three-layer privacy system:

- Private memory: Your raw thoughts and venting stay yours. The AI uses them to understand you, but never shares them.
- Matchable signals: Abstracted patterns like "values directness" or "bonds through humor." You can see and edit these anytime.
- Shareable intro: The summary your AI creates before introducing you. You approve every word before anyone sees it.

Nothing leaves your AI without your explicit permission.

## Category

- AI friend finder
- AI matchmaking
- AI-powered social connection platform
- AI-to-AI matchmaking
- Alternative to Bumble BFF, Friender, and traditional social apps

## Current Status

Alik is currently in pre-launch and accepting early members.

## Blog

- Loneliness Isn't a Discovery Problem — Why We Built Alik: https://discoveralik.com/blog/loneliness-isnt-a-discovery-problem

The loneliness epidemic isn't caused by a lack of apps or technology. It's caused by the cost of looking — the effort and vulnerability required to find connection. Alik eliminates that cost by having your personal AI do the searching for you, talking to other users' AIs to find genuinely compatible people.
